products.name: Zenith Wireless Headphones
products.shortDescription: Premium over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation
products.description: Premium over-ear headphones with active noise cancellation and 30-hour battery life. Features Bluetooth 5.0, comfortable memory foam ear cups, and studio-quality sound. Perfect for music lovers and professionals.

products.name: Minimalist Leather Wallet
products.shortDescription: Handcrafted genuine leather wallet with RFID protection
products.description: Handcrafted genuine leather wallet with RFID protection and minimalist design. Features 6 card slots, 2 bill compartments, and a slim profile that fits comfortably in your pocket. Made from premium full-grain leather that ages beautifully.

products.name: Smart Watch Pro
products.shortDescription: Advanced fitness tracking with heart rate monitoring
products.description: Advanced fitness tracking, heart rate monitoring, and seamless smartphone integration. Track your workouts, sleep patterns, and daily activity. Features GPS, water resistance up to 50m, and 7-day battery life. Compatible with iOS and Android.

products.name: Organic Cotton T-Shirt
products.description: Sustainable, ultra-soft organic cotton tee in minimalist design. Made from 100% certified organic cotton with a relaxed fit. Pre-shrunk, breathable, and perfect for everyday wear. Ethically manufactured with fair trade practices.

products.name: Ceramic Coffee Mug Set
products.description: Artisan-crafted ceramic mugs, set of 4, perfect for your morning ritual. Each mug holds 12oz and features a unique glazed finish. Microwave and dishwasher safe. Handmade by local artisans with attention to detail.

products.name: Premium Yoga Mat
products.shortDescription: Eco-friendly, non-slip yoga mat with extra cushioning
products.description: Eco-friendly, non-slip yoga mat with extra cushioning for ultimate comfort. Made from natural rubber and microfiber. Features alignment lines, 6mm thickness, and comes with a carrying strap. Perfect for yoga, pilates, and meditation.

products.name: Vintage Polaroid Camera
products.shortDescription: Instant film camera with modern features
products.description: Instant film camera with modern features and classic aesthetic. Self-developing film, built-in flash, and automatic exposure control. Capture and share memories instantly with authentic Polaroid quality.

products.name: Bamboo Desk Organizer
products.description: Sustainable bamboo desk organizer with multiple compartments. Features 5 sections for pens, phones, notepads, and office supplies. Eco-friendly, durable, and adds natural warmth to your workspace.

products.name: Stainless Steel Water Bottle
products.shortDescription: Insulated water bottle keeps drinks cold 24hrs
products.description: Insulated water bottle keeps drinks cold for 24 hours, hot for 12 hours. Double-wall vacuum insulation, leak-proof lid, and wide mouth opening. BPA-free stainless steel construction. 32oz capacity.

products.name: Wireless Charging Station
products.description: 3-in-1 wireless charger for phone, watch, and earbuds. Fast charging up to 15W, Qi-certified, and works with all compatible devices. Sleek design with non-slip surface and LED indicator.

products.name: Merino Wool Beanie
products.description: Soft, breathable merino wool beanie for all-season comfort. Temperature-regulating, moisture-wicking, and naturally odor-resistant. Sustainable merino wool from ethical sources. Stretchy fit for all head sizes.

products.name: Smart LED Light Bulbs
products.shortDescription: Color-changing smart bulbs with voice control
products.description: Color-changing smart bulbs with voice control compatibility, pack of 4. Works with Alexa, Google Home, and Siri. 16 million colors, scheduling features, and energy-efficient LED technology. Easy setup via smartphone app.
